title: Harnessing AI for Research Funding Success — Faculty Development Seminar Slides
display_label: AI for Research Funding Success Slides (PDF)
content: PDF slide deck from the 2025-09-30 New Faculty Development Seminar 'Harnessing AI for Research Funding Success'. Presented by Gillian Silver (MPH, CPH, CRA, CPRA, CFRA). Covers how to ethically and effectively use AI tools (including LLMs) for funding opportunity identification, proposal drafting, budget development, and competitive analysis. Includes a companion 'List of AI Tools' prepared by UMMS CARTI.
